title: Where-Is-My-Stuff
description: A simple mod that shows the coordinates of the location a player died in the death screen, and adds a button to copy the location to clipboard
body:
A simple mod that shows the coordinates of the location a player died in the death screen, and adds a button to copy the location to clipboard  
The Copy Location To Clipboard button is only available after 1.1.0 version
  
![Screenshot of the GUI](https://i.imgur.com/yTGqA2G.png)
